title: scurrula stocksii
intro: Scurrula stocksii, also known as the poisonous tree or poison tree, is a species of plant in the family Santalaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Scurrula stocksii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of decoctions and infusions, but it's essential to use caution and consult with a medical professional when utilizing this plant due to its toxic nature.
